title: v0.2.9 = 10th-reset re-release of the adr-0002 slug/num/str lineage (24/24 tests)
content: local-seo-agency v0.2.9 (release commit 489dbb6, feature a360e01) is a 10th post-reset re-release. Active branch dev-clone/adr-0002-parallel-utils ‚Äî the slug/num/str lib-utils lineage of v0.2.4-v0.2.6/v0.2.8, NOT the adr-0001 rank.ts lineage of v0.2.7. Branch reads 8f2a019‚Üía360e01‚Üí489dbb6. Change set: Added ‚Äî three dependency-free pure-utility modules src/lib/{slug,num,str}.ts (slugify; clamp/roundTo; truncate/titleCase) with 24 co-located tests (num 10 + slug 7 + str 7); npm test harness (node --import tsx --test) + tsx devDep; ADR-0002 doc. Changed ‚Äî README tech-stack refresh. Release commit touches only CHANGELOG+package.json; code lives in feature commit. Version 0.2.0‚Üí0.2.9 skips burned tags 0.2.1-0.2.8. CHANGELOG [0.2.9] pre-authored by Release Manager, verified accurate (claims '24/24 green' ‚Äî matches actual count). README untouched in release; tech-stack current; Scripts-table/structure-tree edits deferred per standing human v0.2.2 rejection. Working tree CLEAN this run (no uncommitted README edit, unlike the 9th run). Last-processed: 489dbb6. Pattern: resets keep re-releasing the same utility work under fresh versions ‚Äî verify CHANGELOG, defer README, advance pointer.

title: Session capture (Stop) ‚Äî 2026-05-27 16:48 UTC
ADR-0002 re-implemented after full workspace reset (2026-05-27 ~17:xx, 24 tests green)
content: Another full-reset run for local-seo-agency: src/lib held only cn.ts+format.ts, package.json had NO test script and NO tsx devDep (npm install reported 'up to date' ‚Äî tsx binary lingered in node_modules but was not in package.json), ADR-0001 test files wiped (only docs/adr/ADR-0001 survived). Re-implemented ADR-0002 from the settled decision: slug.ts (slugify ASCII-only), num.ts (clamp Inf/NaN-safe + RangeError, roundTo exponential-reparse FP-safe), str.ts (truncate ellipsis-budgeted, titleCase whitespace-preserving), colocated *.test.ts, no cross-imports. My 3 modules = 24 tests (7 slug + 10 num + 7 str). Added tsx@^4.22.3 + `test` script. 24/24 green ~202ms Node v24.12.0, tsc clean. Confirms recurring full-reset pattern; suite total is 24 when ADR-0001 tests absent, ~42 when present ‚Äî read the actual `# tests` line.
